allow: Bash(lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1 && npx next dev --turbopack -p 3000)

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/tenant/draft-config 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
sections = data.get\('home', {}\).get\('sections', []\)
for s in sections:
    print\(f'Section: {s.get\(\\"definitionId\\"\)}, scheduledShow={s.get\(\\"scheduledShow\\"\)}, scheduledHide={s.get\(\\"scheduledHide\\"\)}'\)
    for b in s.get\('blocks', []\):
        print\(f'  Block: {b.get\(\\"type\\"\)}, scheduledShow={b.get\(\\"scheduledShow\\"\)}, scheduledHide={b.get\(\\"scheduledHide\\"\)}'\)
        for slotKey, elements in b.get\('slots', {}\).items\(\):
            for el in elements:
                show = el.get\('scheduledShow'\)
                hide = el.get\('scheduledHide'\)
                settings_show = el.get\('settings', {}\).get\('scheduledShow'\)
                settings_hide = el.get\('settings', {}\).get\('scheduledHide'\)
                if show or hide or settings_show or settings_hide:
                    print\(f'    Element [{slotKey}]: {el.get\(\\"type\\"\)} id={el.get\(\\"id\\"\)}'\)
                    print\(f'      instance: scheduledShow={show}, scheduledHide={hide}'\)
                    print\(f'      settings: scheduledShow={settings_show}, scheduledHide={settings_hide}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/tenant/draft-config 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
config = data.get\('config', {}\)
print\('config keys:', list\(config.keys\(\)\)[:15]\)
home = config.get\('home', {}\)
print\('config.home keys:', list\(home.keys\(\)\)\)
sections = home.get\('sections', []\)
cards = home.get\('cards', []\)
print\(f'sections: {len\(sections\)}, cards: {len\(cards\)}'\)
for s in sections[:3]:
    print\(f'  section: {s.get\(\\"definitionId\\"\)} blocks={len\(s.get\(\\"blocks\\", []\)\)}'\)
for c in cards[:3]:
    t = c.get\('type','?'\)
    print\(f'  card: {t} title={str\(c.get\(\\"title\\",\\"?\\"\)\)[:30]}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/tenant/draft-config 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
sections = data['config']['home']['sections']
for s in sections:
    blocks = s.get\('blocks'\) or []
    if not blocks: continue
    print\(f'Section: {s[\\"definitionId\\"]} id={s[\\"id\\"]} scheduledShow={s.get\(\\"scheduledShow\\"\)} scheduledHide={s.get\(\\"scheduledHide\\"\)}'\)
    for b in blocks:
        slots = b.get\('slots', {}\)
        print\(f'  Block: {b[\\"type\\"]} id={b[\\"id\\"]} scheduledShow={b.get\(\\"scheduledShow\\"\)}'\)
        for sk, els in slots.items\(\):
            for el in els:
                print\(f'    [{sk}] {el[\\"type\\"]} id={el[\\"id\\"]}'\)
                print\(f'      instance keys: {[k for k in el.keys\(\)]}'\)
                if el.get\('scheduledShow'\) or el.get\('scheduledHide'\):
                    print\(f'      INSTANCE schedule: show={el.get\(\\"scheduledShow\\"\)} hide={el.get\(\\"scheduledHide\\"\)}'\)
                ss = el.get\('settings', {}\)
                if ss.get\('scheduledShow'\) or ss.get\('scheduledHide'\):
                    print\(f'      IN SETTINGS \(wrong!\): show={ss.get\(\\"scheduledShow\\"\)} hide={ss.get\(\\"scheduledHide\\"\)}'\)
" 2>&1)
